prompt: Use the uploaded reference image as the primary visual reference for the subject's facial features, hairstyle, expression, skin tone, clothing style, and overall likeness. Preserve the identity, pose inspiration, lighting mood, and cinematic aesthetic from the reference while recreating the scene below. Do not copy the image exactly—maintain the person's recognizable appearance in a new composition. Create a hyper-realistic cinematic scene of a miniature photographer standing on a circular display platform while photographing with a professional mirrorless camera. Giant camera bodies, telephoto lenses, and studio equipment surround him on a wooden tabletop. In the background, a massive softly blurred portrait of the same person from the reference image smiles at the scene, creating the illusion that the miniature version exists inside his own photography studio. Include a professional LED panel light, realistic reflections, premium camera gear, warm cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, ultra-detailed textures, natural skin tones, fantasy perspective, volumetric lighting, HDR, commercial photography quality, 85mm lens, f/1.4, photorealistic, ultra-realistic, 8K masterpiece.
promptEn: Use the uploaded reference image as the primary visual reference for the subject's facial features, hairstyle, expression, skin tone, clothing style, and overall likeness. Create a hyper-realistic cinematic scene of a miniature photographer standing on a circular display platform while photographing with a professional mirrorless camera. Giant camera bodies, telephoto lenses, and studio equipment surround him on a wooden tabletop. In the background, a massive softly blurred portrait of the same person from the reference image smiles at the scene, creating the illusion that the miniature version exists inside his own photography studio. Include a professional LED panel light, realistic reflections, premium camera gear, warm cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, ultra-detailed textures, natural skin tones, fantasy perspective, volumetric lighting, HDR, commercial photography quality, 85mm lens, f/1.4, photorealistic, ultra-realistic, 8K masterpiece.
promptZh: 请使用上传的参考图作为 主体面部特征、发型、表情、肤色、服装风格及整体相似度的主要视觉参考。在重现下方场景时，保留参考图中的人物身份、姿势灵感、光影氛围和电影感美学。请勿完全复制原图，而是在新的构图中保持人物的可辨识度。创建一个超写实的电影感场景：一位 微缩摄影师 站在 圆形展示台 上，正使用专业无反相机进行拍摄。木质桌面上，巨型相机机身、长焦镜头和影棚设备将其环绕。背景中，参考图中的同一人物正以巨大的、柔焦的肖像微笑注视着这一场景，营造出微缩版人物存在于其自身摄影棚内的错觉。包含专业 LED 平板灯、逼真的反射、高端摄影器材、温暖的电影感光效、浅景深、奶油般虚化的背景、超精细纹理、自然的肤色、奇幻视角、体积光、HDR、商业摄影品质、85mm 镜头、f/1.4 光圈、照片级真实感、超写实、8K 杰作。
